short_term_equities.catalyst: Institutional delivery volumes surged 62% above the 30-day baseline — strong accumulation signal. RSI at 61 reflects sustained bullish momentum without entering overbought territory. 10-day price momentum of +3.4% confirms near-term directional strength.

Institutional delivery volumes surged 48% above the 30-day baseline. Price trading in close proximity to the 20-day EMA — classic breakout launchpad configuration. News sentiment firmly bullish; macro headlines aligned with price action.
RSI at 57 reflects sustained bullish momentum. 10-day price momentum of +2.6% confirms near-term directional strength. Delivery surge 1.31x above baseline.
RSI at 52 indicating neutral-bullish zone with room to run. Delivery volumes 1.22x above baseline. Price near 20-day EMA presents low-risk entry configuration.

long_term_equities.structural_drivers: Core RoE of 16.2% reflects sustained capital efficiency over multiple annual cycles. Revenue growth of 14.8% YoY demonstrates structural demand tailwinds. Conservative balance sheet (D/E: 0.18) provides flexibility for opportunistic capex. Order pipeline from India's National Infrastructure Pipeline (NIP) remains robust at ₹111 Lakh Crore.
Revenue growth of 38.2% YoY demonstrates structural demand tailwinds. India's 500 GW non-fossil capacity target by 2030 provides structural 7-year visibility.

Core RoE of 22.4% reflects sustained capital efficiency. Revenue growth of 67.3% YoY demonstrates structural demand tailwinds. PLI Scheme beneficiary — domestic electronics manufacturing capacity scaling at CAGR 28%+.
Revenue growth of 18.4% YoY on ARPU expansion. Conservative balance sheet. 5G rollout with 6 Lakh+ base stations creating enterprise connectivity demand across India.

precious_metals.macro_drivers: US Real Yield at 1.85% softening, clearing structural headwinds. DXY consolidating at 104.2, neutral for EM assets. Central bank reserve diversification continues to anchor structural demand. 5-day spot momentum: +1.20%.

Silver tracks gold with elevated beta; 5-day momentum: +1.80%. Industrial demand from solar panel manufacturing and EV components provides dual-demand architecture. Gold/Silver ratio compression likely as industrial recovery accelerates.
